title: Chinese New Year greetings
description: Exchange New Year wishes and receive a lai see red packet
location: Family home visit, Lunar New Year
context: Lunar New Year (農曆新年) is the biggest celebration in the Chinese calendar. In Hong Kong, people visit relatives, exchange greetings (拜年), and give red packets of money (利是 lai si). Saying the right greetings matters — elders appreciate the effort.
cultural_note: The flower markets (花市, faa1 si5) that open across Hong Kong for two weeks before Lunar New Year are one of the city's great collective spectacles, hundreds of thousands of people cramming narrow stalls to buy kumquat trees, narcissus bulbs, and peach blossoms. The rush to buy the last flowers at midnight before New Year's Eve, when vendors slash prices on remaining stock, is a competitive sport.

lines.speaker: you
lines.jyutping: san1 nin4 faai3 lok6, gung1 hei2 faat3 coi4!
lines.english: Happy New Year, wishing you prosperity!

lines.speaker: elder
lines.cjk: 恭喜恭喜！身體健康，萬事如意！
lines.jyutping: gung1 hei2 gung1 hei2! san1 tai2 gin6 hong1, maan6 si6 jyu4 ji3!
lines.english: Congratulations! Wishing you good health and all the best!

lines.speaker: you
lines.cjk: 多謝！祝你身體健康，萬事如意！
lines.jyutping: do1 ze6! zuk1 nei5 san1 tai2 gin6 hong1, maan6 si6 jyu4 ji3!
lines.english: Thank you! Wishing you good health and all the best!

lines.speaker: elder
lines.jyutping: lai4, ni1 fung1 lai6 si6 bei2 nei5.
lines.english: Here, a red packet for you.

lines.speaker: you
lines.jyutping: do1 ze6 saai3! gam2 ngo5 m4 haak3 hei3 laa3.
lines.english: Thank you so much! I won't be shy then.

lines.speaker: elder
lines.jyutping: nei5 gam1 nin4 jau5 me1 daa2 syun3?
lines.english: What are your plans for this year?

lines.speaker: you
lines.cjk: 希望今年廣東話講得好啲，識多啲香港朋友。
lines.jyutping: hei1 mong6 gam1 nin4 gwong2 dung1 waa2 gong2 dak1 hou2 di1, sik1 do1 di1 hoeng1 gong2 pang4 jau5.
lines.english: I hope to speak better Cantonese this year and make more Hong Kong friends.

lines.speaker: elder
lines.cjk: 好嘢！你廣東話越講越好㗎喇！
lines.jyutping: hou2 je5! nei5 gwong2 dung1 waa2 jyut6 gong2 jyut6 hou2 ga3 laa3!
lines.english: Excellent! Your Cantonese just keeps getting better!
